preamble: The transformation of a glottal or velar fricative into a voiceless labiodental fricative /f/, a process involving the labialization of a back fricative.

examples.note: Final velar fricative shifted to labiodental /f/.
Final velar fricative shifted to labiodental /f/.

sources: Jespersen, O. (1909). A Modern English Grammar on Historical Principles. Carl Winter.
